description.ko: ECHO-0는 음파의 진동을 복잡한 기하학적 구조로 변환하는 실험적 시각화입니다. 침묵과 소음의 리듬과 주파수를 포착하여 덧없는 음파를 가시적인 디지털 풍경으로 구현합니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an experimental visualization that translates sonic vibrations into complex geometric structures. It captures the rhythm and frequency of silence and noise, turning ephemeral sound waves into a tangible digital landscape.

prompt: A high-tech digital art piece titled ECHO-0, depicting sound visualization. Abstract fluid crystalline structures vibrating in a dark void. Luminous blue and silver frequency waves ripples, oscilloscope patterns integrated into 3D architectural forms, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, procedural textures, cyberpunk aesthetic.
